content: OPENING RANGE BREAKOUT: Define high/low of first 5-15 min. Long on break above range high with volume, short below range low. Stop at opposite side. Best on stocks gapping >2% pre-market. 80% of daily range established by 10:30 AM EST.
FIRST HOUR RULE: Never trade first 5 min. Highest probability 9:45-10:30 AM EST. By 11:30 AM volume dies. Avoid midday 11:30-2:00 PM - low probability chop.
ABCD PATTERN: Impulse A-B, pullback to C (38-50% Fib), continuation D. Entry at C with MA/VWAP support. Stop below C. Target = AB leg extension.
BULL FLAG: Spike on heavy volume, tight parallel consolidation. Entry on break above flag resistance with volume. Stop below flag low. Tighter = more explosive.
VWAP: Price above = bullish, below = bearish. Buy pullbacks to VWAP in uptrend. Acts as magnet and S/R. Institutional execution benchmark.
RED-TO-GREEN: Stock opens red, crosses above prior close with volume. Longer in red = stronger move from trapped shorts. Requires catalyst.
RISK: Max 1% per trade. Size = Account Risk / Trade Risk. Daily loss limit = 3%. Hit = done. Three losing days = day off.
11 RULES: Best setups only. No overtrade. Cut fast. Let winners run. No revenge. Accept wrong. Risk first. Stick plan. Review. Journal. Learn.
GAPPERS: Gap >2% with catalyst. Float <50M. High short interest = squeeze. Entry at ORB not open. Never chase 10%+ moved.
GAP TRADING: Earnings gaps 3x+ volume continue. Gaps below support keep falling. Fill in 1hr = fade. No fill = trend with it.
SCALPING: Strongest on news volume. 1-min entry breaks 5-min high. Target 0.5-1%. Exit 5-15 min. Level 2 required.
SIZING: Shares = (Account x Risk%) / (Entry - Stop). Never widen stops. Scale: 50% initial, 25% confirm, 25% breakout.
END-OF-DAY FADE: New highs last 30 min declining volume = gap down next day. Selloff into close low volume = gap up.
RISK OF RUIN: 60% WR 1:1 R:R, risk 10% = >50% ruin. Risk 2% = near-zero. Kelly: (win% x avg win/avg loss) - (1-win%).
OVERTRADING: #1 killer. Boredom trading, sizing up after losses. Max 3-5 trades/day. Quality 2-3x in first 2 hours.
LONG STRADDLE: Buy ATM call+put. Max loss = premium. Profits large move either way. Best IV rank <20 with catalyst.
LONG STRANGLE: OTM call+put. Cheaper, needs larger move. Delta-neutral. Best 30-45 DTE.
SHORT STRADDLE: Sell ATM call+put. Max profit = credit. Unlimited risk. IV rank >80. Close at 50% profit.
SHORT STRANGLE: Sell OTM call+put. 16-delta = ~68% PoP. Manage at 50%. Undefined risk - size strictly.
IRON CONDOR: Sell OTM put+call spreads. Net credit. Max profit = credit. Max loss = width-credit. Close at 50% or 2x credit stop.
BULL CALL VERTICAL: Buy lower call, sell higher. Limited risk/profit. Better than naked call - reduces cost.
BEAR PUT VERTICAL: Buy higher put, sell lower. Defined risk on decline. Entry when IV low.
CALENDAR SPREAD: Sell near-term, buy longer-term same strike. Profits from decay and/or rising IV.
GREEKS: Delta=direction. Gamma=delta change. Theta=decay. Vega=IV sensitivity. Condors negative vega. Straddles positive vega.
IV RANK: >50=sell premium. <30=buy. 30-50=neutral. Mispriced vol = #1 options edge.
GAMMA RISK: Highest ATM near expiry. Close/roll at 21 DTE. Never hold short through expiry week.
VEGA EARNINGS: IV rises before, crushes after. Buy 21 DTE, sell 1 day before. Avg IV expansion 20-40%.
THETA DECAY: Accelerates last 30 days. ~35% lost. Sellers 30-45 DTE. Buyers 60-90 DTE.
BUTTERFLY: Buy 1 ITM, sell 2 ATM, buy 1 OTM. Max profit at middle strike. Profits from decay.
BACKSPREAD: Sell 1 ATM, buy 2+ OTM. Credit or small debit. Unlimited upside. Free lottery if credit.
COLLAR: Long stock + long put + short call. Limits both sides. Call finances put. Best = zero cost.
COVERED WRITE: Long 100 shares + short ATM call. Income. ~2-5% monthly. Best high IV sideways/bullish.
CONDOR ADJUST: Tested side near strike = roll untested closer. Or close tested, keep untested free. Max loss = 2x credit.
TOP-DOWN ETF: 1) Broad trend SPY>200MA. 2) Sector RS vs SPY. 3) Best RS in sector. 4) Time with patterns.
ETF RS: Compare sectors 3-6 month RS. Outperformers = leaders. RS new highs with price = buy. RS declining = distribution.
SECTOR ROTATION: Early=XLF,XLY. Mid=XLK,XLI. Late=XLE,XLB. Recession=XLU,XLP,XLV. Monthly RS. Leads price 1-3mo.
LEVERAGED ETF DECAY: 2x/3x daily rebalancing decay. +10%-10% = -1% underlying, -9% 3x. Never hold >few days.
ETF ENTRY: Pullback to 10/20 EMA bounce. Or flag/pennant breakout. Never chase 5%+ from support.
ETF ROTATION MODEL: Rank sectors by 3mo RS monthly. Long top 3. Rebalance monthly. Outperformed 3-5% annually.
REGIME: SPY>200+50>200=bull long only. <200+50<200=bear short/cash. Mixed=reduce 50%.
ETF SIZING: Max 10-15% per ETF. Leveraged 3-5%. ATR stops 2x 20-day. Max 30% one sector. Cash 30-50% when unclear.
INTERMARKET CHAIN: Bonds lead stocks, stocks lead commodities, commodities lead currencies. Monitor all four for confluence.
GOLD-DOLLAR: Negative -0.6 to -0.8. Gold leads miners 1-3 days. Dollar as gold indicator. Both rally = safe haven crisis.
S&P CORRELATIONS: DAX 0.85+, Euro Stoxx 0.90+, VIX -0.75. Euro Stoxx leads S&P 3-5 min European hours.
OIL-STOCK: Fluctuates -0.5 to +0.5 by regime. Break from norm = regime change signal.
REGIME: RISK-ON=stocks/bonds/commodities/USD. RISK-OFF=opposite. STAGFLATION=stocks+down/commodities up. GOLDILOCKS=stocks up/bonds flat.
CARRY TRADE: Borrow JPY/CHF buy AUD/NZD. AUD/JPY drops 2%+=risk-off. Sell equities.
BOND-STOCK DIVERGENCE: Falling yields+rising stocks=goldilocks. Rising yields+falling= tightening. 10Y yield leads stocks 1-3mo.
COMMODITY-CURRENCY: AUD/gold 0.7+. CAD/oil 0.6+. CHF safe haven. JPY risk-off. Trade currencies by commodity correlations.
CORRELATION INSTABILITY: Not constant. Rolling 50/200-day. Strong correlation break = regime change signal.
YIELD CURVE: 2Y>10Y=inversion=recession 6-18mo. Steep=expansion. Monitor 2s10s. Negative=defensive.
GLOBAL LEADERSHIP: US leads 1-5 days. Europe 1-3. Asia 1-2. DAX up 2%=S&P gaps up. Early warning.
DOLLAR-COMMODITY: Strong negative. Dollar up=commodities down. Natural hedge.
INTERMARKET DIVERGENCE: Gold up miners not=catch up. S&P up credit widening=correct. Divergences signal stress.
VIX-STOCK: -0.75. <15=complacency. >30=fear. Contango=bullish. Backwardation=bearish. Flip=defend.
BUBBLE: 1)Precipitating factor. 2)Amplification feedback. 3)Cultural narrative. 4)Anchoring. 5)Herd behavior. Bursts when narrative crumbles.
NATURAL PONZI: Early profits attract buyers pushing prices higher. Self-reinforcing bubbles persist years.
ANCHORING: Recent highs as fair value. Normalizes elevated prices. P/E anchors to bubble norms.
HERD: Follow others not analysis. Rational individually, catastrophic collectively. Crypto herding identical to equity.
NEW ERA: This time is different. 1920s/1960s/1990s/2020s. Everyone agreeing = top near.
MEDIA AMPLIFICATION: Superficial narratives confirming trends. Competition = extreme takes.
CAPE: >30=near-zero 10yr returns. <10=15%+ annually. Not timing but powerful for allocation.
SELF-FULFILLING PROPHECY: Price from similar hunches reinforced by media. Everyone follows everyone.
PRICE-SENSITIVE FEEDBACK: Rising prices=wealth effect=spending=earnings=prices. Speed depends on leverage.
ATTENTION CASCADE: Rising prices attract attention, buying, media, more buying. Monitor Google Trends.
INSURANCE FLOAT: Premiums now, claims later, invest float. $1 equity ~$0.50 float. 3% cost, 13% return = compounding machine.
CASH FORTRESS: Cash in bulls, deploy in crisis. Goldman preferred 10% in 2008. Cash = call option on crises.
MUNGER INVERSION: How to lose not win. Avoid leverage, bad businesses, overpaying, crowd-following.
MGMT ASSESSMENT: Owner-thinkers, capital allocators, candid, bureaucratic resistance.
BRAND POWER: Cash with minimal reinvestment. Pricing power. Crypto: developer loyalty + network effects.
COMPOUNDING: 25.9% annual zero down years. 50% loss needs 100% gain. Protect capital above all.
CIRCLE OF COMPETENCE: Invest only what you understand. Crypto: cant explain tokenomics = skip.
TEMPERAMENT: Rationality in euphoria and panic. Emotional discipline > analytical brilliance.
PUNCH CARD: 20 lifetime trades. Extreme selectivity. 3-5 high conviction. Quality over quantity.
MOATS: Cost, network, intangible, switching, efficient scale. Wide = decades high returns.
OWNER EARNINGS: NI + D&A - CapEx. Crypto: protocol revenue - emissions = sustainable yield.
BE FEARFUL WHEN GREEDY: VIX<15+highs=cautious. VIX>40+crashes=aggressive. Deployed billions 2008.
CRISIS OPPORTUNITY: Goldman 10% preferred. GE. BNSF. Build cash reserves for crisis deployment.
TURTLE SIZING: ATR normalized. Unit=(Account x 1%)/(N x $/pt). Max 4/market, 10/direction, 12 total.
TURTLE ENTRY: Sys1: 20-day breakout exit 10-day. Skip if last won. Sys2: 55-day. Take all. 70% profit from 5-10 trades/yr.
TURTLE RISK: Max 2%/trade, 12 total, 6/direction, 4/market. Correlated share limits.
TURTLE PARADOX: Works because most cant execute. 30-40% WR. Quit during streaks = miss big winners.
BACKTEST TRAPS: Curve-fitting, survivorship bias, look-ahead bias, cost neglect. Out-of-sample. Simple > complex.
DRAWDOWN: Accept 20-40%. Predefine max DD. Exceeded = reduce size 50% not abandon. Biggest trends follow biggest pain.
EXPECTANCY: (Win%xAW)-(Loss%xAL). 40%WR 3:1=0.60/dollar. Low WR not low profitability.
R-MULTIPLES: Trade as R. +3R, -1R. Removes size bias. Judge 100+ trades.
CORRELATION RISK: 12 diversified 0.8+=ONE bet. Crisis correlations 1.0. >0.7 reduce positions.
ROBUSTNESS: Test multiple markets/timeframes/regimes. One instrument only = curve-fit.
LOSS AVERSION: 30-40% WR feels like failure. Dont look at individual P&L. Monthly only.
EDGE PER TRADE: 0.5-2%. 200 trades/yr at 0.5%=100%+. Variance hides edge 20-30 trades.
MECHANICAL VS DISCRETIONARY: Rules for sizing/entry/exit. Discretionary only to REDUCE risk.
TREND ID: Higher highs/lows. 20 EMA filter. ADX>25. 50/200 golden cross = major bull.
TREND ENTRY: Confirmed uptrend, pullback to support, reversal candle, stop below, target 2:1 R:R.
MA CONFLUENCE: 10/20/50 convergence = powerful move. Compression after consolidation.
RSI TRENDS: Uptrend 40-80 (40=oversold). Downtrend 20-60 (60=overbought). 30/70 only for ranging.
CAN SLIM: C=Current 25%+. A=Annual. N=New. S=Supply volume. L=Leader RS>80. I=Institutional. M=Market.
CUP WITH HANDLE: 20-30% decline, rounded bottom, handle. Pivot=10c above handle. 50%+ volume. Stop 7-8%.
8% STOP: Cut losses 8% below purchase. No exceptions. Buy 10, cut 7, need 2-3 at 100-200%+.
SELLING: 20-25% for most. Exception leaders 8-12wk or 200%+. Below 50-day MA heavy volume = sell.
MARKET DIRECTION: 3-5 distribution days in 2-3wk = top. Follow-through 1.5%+ heavier volume = confirmed uptrend.
LEADERSHIP: Earnings 25%+, RS>90, top industry, institutional, new product. Concentrate 5-8 leaders.
NEVER AVERAGE DOWN: Wrong at $50, more wrong at $45. #1 cause of large losses.
BREAKOUT VOLUME: New high must surge 50%+ above avg. Institutional buying. No volume = fake.
INDUSTRY GROUP: 50% of stock move. Buy top 10-20 groups. First breakout in new theme = leaders.
TIGHT PATTERNS: 3-4wk closes within 1-2%. Institutional support. Breakout from tight = explosive.
SELL TO CASH: Downtrend signal = sell 50%+. Cash is optionality. Cant buy bargains fully invested.
SOVEREIGN DEBT: Banking debt/revenue predicts default. Ireland 25x. Pattern: bubble, absorb, explode, default.
CDS WARNING: Greek CDS 11bp to 2300bp. >200bp=risk. Credit warns weeks/months before equities.
IRELAND: Govt guaranteed all bank debt. Sovereign credit becomes banking risk. Monitor bank/GDP.
JAPAN: >200% debt/GDP aging savers. Savings drop, borrow internationally. Workforce shrink = inevitable.
SURVIVORSHIP BIAS: 1000 flippers, 10 get 10 heads. Those 10 write books. Skill often luck.
ALTERNATIVE HISTORY: For every winner thousands lost. One path observed. Judge full distribution.
BLACK SWAN: Models underestimate 10-100x. Size for 3-5x worst. Never leverage that wipes in gap.
BARBELL: 85-90% safe + 10-15% asymmetric. Avoid middle - tail risk without upside.
LOSS AVERSION: 2.5x worse. Holding losers, selling winners. Mechanical rules. Remove emotion.
NARRATIVE FALLACY: Stories for randomness. 5 wins = found edge. Combat: stats, 100+ trades.
MEDALIST: Roulette survivor not skilled. Selling OTM puts, carry, short vol = disguised roulette.
SKEWNESS: Negative skew dangerous. Positive skew superior. Seek $1 risk for $3+ reward.
EMH: Prices reflect info. Not perfectly efficient. Hard to exploit mispricings.
RANDOM PATTERNS: Random data shows all classic patterns. Many signals are data-mined artifacts.
DATA MINING: More hypotheses = more false positives. Bonferroni: 100 tests = 5 false significant.
SCUTTLEBUTT: Talk to customers, suppliers, competitors. Ground-level research. Crypto: GitHub, Discord.
COST HYPOTHESIS: Index 0.03% vs active 1-2%. 30yr = 40-60% lost to fees. Minimize commissions/slippage.
FUNDAMENTALS: Revenue, earnings, FCF, D/E, ROE, moat, mgmt. Direction bias. Technicals for timing.
FED POLICY: Tightening = dollar up, stocks correct 6-12mo lag. Easing reverses. Position before trend.
CYCLES: Leading: permits, claims, ISM, stocks. Coincident: production, GDP. Lagging: CPI. Leading turn 3-6mo early.
BINARY OPTIONS: Yes/no. Correct=$100, wrong=$0. Max risk=premium. Known risk/reward. Direction AND timing.
BINARY STRATEGIES: ATM 50/50 1:1. ITM higher prob. OTM higher payoff. ATM or slightly ITM for conviction trades.
NFP BINARY: Buy OTM Wed-Thu. Close after release. Consensus within 20K. Surprises 50K+ = biggest moves.
MONEYBALL: Find undervalued edges. Most use same indicators. Edge in unconventional: unusual options, on-chain, sentiment.
INCENTIVE PROBLEM: Traders keep profits, firm bears losses = moral hazard. Evaluate who bears downside.
SUCCESSFUL TRAITS: Specialize ONE setup. Journals. Risk 0.5-2%. Patient A+ setups. Business mindset.
6-MONTH RULE: 6-8mo practice. 3mo sim first. Deliberate practice not passive learning.
FEAR PARADOX: Scariest trades often best. Panicking crowd = best risk/reward. Fear = crowd on wrong side.
GRAHAM TO MUNGER: Net-nets to quality at fair price. Adapt as capital grows. $10K vs $1B different strategies.
PERMANENT CAPITAL: Corp structure no redemptions. Trade with money you wont need years.
BERKSHIRE ORIGIN: $7-8 (book $19) below net working capital. Bad businesses great at right price.
SNOWBALL: Knowledge compounds like money. Buffett reads 500+ pages/day. No shortcut to mastery.
ONE-DOLLAR TEST: $1 retained creates >$1 value? Yes = capital creating. Invest alongside best allocators.
SIMPLE MATH: Arithmetic + emotional control. Complex adds precision not accuracy. Simple executed consistently.
BUSINESSLIKE: Would you buy entire company? Hold 10yr? No = dont buy one share.
CASH IS OPTIONALITY: Reserves in bulls. Deploy in crisis when no one else can.
RS ASSET ROTATION: Rank assets 6mo RS monthly. Top 2-3. Rebalance quarterly.
GOLD CRISIS: Rallies in crises. Falling during = liquidity crisis. Both falling = most dangerous deleveraging.
INTRADAY LEADS: Euro Stoxx leads S&P 3-5min. DAX leads Euro Stoxx. Bonds lead equities 1-2min.
MARGIN SPREADS: Portfolio margin reduces requirements. Vertical = max loss. Check broker offers it.
ETF EXECUTION: Limit mid for liquid. Spread >0.1% = skip. Avoid market first/last 15min.
RS RATING: Compare all stocks 12mo. >80=top 20%. Best >90 before major moves.
A/D RATING: Price/volume institutional. A=heavy buying, E=heavy selling. Track weekly.
BASE-ON-BASE: Second base at higher level. Breakout from second = extremely bullish.
BUBBLE CHECKLIST: Rising prices, tech excitement, volume, media, new era, valuations, confidence, new products.
NATURAL EXPERIMENTS: Bubbles same pattern worldwide. Crypto identical to equity bubbles.
ASYMMETRIC PAYOFF: $1 risk for $3+ even at 40% WR. Positive skew mathematically superior.
INSURANCE VEHICLE: Premiums now claims later. Float grew $100B+. Funds 10-15% investments.
GEICO CRISIS: $61 to $2. Buffett knew model sound. Bought heavily. 50x return.
10 HABITS: Trend, cut losses, let winners, risk first, journal, review, plan, disciplined, learn, own money.
EARNINGS QUALITY: Revenue-driven, recurring, OCF>NI, positive surprises, guidance raised.
FIRM FOUNDATION VS CASTLE: DCF vs momentum. Use foundation for allocation, castle for trading.
SENTIMENT: IG Client Sentiment, COT. 75%+ retail long = contrarian short. Institutional extremes = reversal.
S/R DAY TRADING: Prior day high/low/close, pre-market range. Buy bounces, short resistance. Tested levels STRONGER.
FLOAT FILTER: Low float <20M + low cap <$2B = biggest moves. 50-200% squeeze potential.
JOURNAL: Entry/exit/time, screenshot, setup, emotional state, market conditions, P&L. Review weekly.
PRE-MARKET: 6:00 news. 6:30 gappers. 7:00 S/R. 8:00 direction. 8:30 data. 9:15 plan. Prep=80% success.
LEVEL 2: Bid/ask prices+sizes. Large bids=support, large asks=resistance. Thick bid/thin ask=buying pressure.
RATIO SPREAD: Buy 1 ATM sell 2+ OTM. Can be zero cost. Unlimited risk past short strikes.
ETF SHORT: Below 200MA declining RS bottom sector groups. Cover above 10-day MA. No borrow fees.
REPUTATIONAL RISK: 20yr to build, 5min to ruin. Protect psychological capital. Revenge trade cascade.
POSITION HEAT: Aggregate unrealized risk. Normal 30-50%, elevated 50-70%, max 80%. All can move against simultaneously.
IPO LEADERS: No overhead supply, entrepreneurial. Screen <8yr EPS+RS >80+.
COMMODITY-CURRENCY: AUD/gold 0.7+. CAD/oil 0.6+. CHF safe haven. JPY risk-off.
DOW 10K: Brokerage celebrating milestones = crowd lost perspective. Warning not buy signal.
VALUATION: Price vs value. Intrinsic=DCF. Buy 25-30% below. Most crypto = pure speculation.
HINDSIGHT BIAS: Everyone knew after. Write predictions BEFORE events. Track hit rate.
LUDIC FALLACY: Casino models for markets flawed. Rules change, distribution unknown, Black Swans exist.
IN VS OUT SAMPLE: 70/30 split. Good in bad out = curve-fit. 2-3 params robust, 10+ fragile.
SYSTEM COMMITMENT: Min 100 trades. 30 trade sample hides edge. Switching = experiencing all losses.
SELL 20-25%: Most consolidate after. Exception: 20% in 1-3wk massive volume = hold for 100%+.
GOLD-DOLLAR: Strong negative. Gold leads miners 1-3 days. Dollar as gold indicator.
FREE-RIDER: If millions research, why analyze? Creates complacency. Nobody questions until crash.
MOAT TYPES: Cost (GEICO), network (Visa), intangible (Coke), switching (enterprise), scale (utilities).
CIRCUIT BREAKERS: 7% halt 15min, 13% 15min, 20% close. LULD halts. Reduce before events.
SYNTHETICS: Long call + short put = synthetic long stock. Reduce margin, exploit put-call parity.
TICK: Uptick-downtick. >+500=buying. <-500=selling. +/-1000=reversal. Confirm or fade extremes.
MARKET VS LIMIT: Market=fill not price. Limit=price not fill. Liquid=limit. Breakouts=market.
PDT RULE: <$25K limited 3 trades/5 days. Cash account, futures, multiple brokers, or $25K+.
HOTKEYS: Buy/sell preset size. Auto stop. Flatten all. Scale 50% target. 2sec delay = 0.1-0.3% cost.
BUSINESS: Not get rich. 84% lose. Profession. Tools+education+patience. 6-8 months to success.
MARGIN: Never >50%. >75% = reduce. Margin calls at worst time. Intraday 4:1 close before end.
NO-SYSTEM: Abandoning during DD = all losses, no wins. Commit 100+ trades minimum.
CORRELATION INSTABILITY: Rolling 50/200-day. Break from strong correlation = regime change.
GRAHAM-NEWMAN: Bought below net working capital. Adapted to quality at fair price.
DAILY GRAPHS: Study leaders weekly. Mark buy points, S/R. Hand-marking builds pattern recognition.
NARRATIVE: Every bubble this time is different. 1920s radio, 1960s conglomerates, 1990s internet, 2020s AI.
PUNCH CARD 20: Forces extreme selectivity. Quality over quantity produces better returns.
BASE RATE: Always use base rates. What % of breakouts continue? Gut = unquantified bias. Measure.
PORTER: New entrants, supplier power, buyer power, substitutes, rivalry. High barriers+low rivalry=best.
LIFECYCLE: Young aggressive 90% stocks. Middle 60/40. Near retirement 40/60. Reduce 1%/year.
FISHER 15: Mgmt, R&D, sales, margins, improving margins, labor, exec depth, costs, moat, long-range, self-funding, honest, unique edge.
DELTA HEDGING: Maintain delta-neutral by adjusting stock as underlying moves. Gamma scalping profits from movement.
GLOBAL CORRELATIONS: DAX 0.85+ Euro Stoxx 0.90+. Japan-specific events Shanghai leads. US futures as early warning.
